---
title: "Exhaustion_Marker_search_code"
author: "Alos Diallo"
date: "2025-10-09"
output: html_document
---

Main EWAS Code
```{r}
# ewas_metastasis_h6_normImmune.R     · 2025-07-18
# Single HiTIMED h = 6 → immune-fraction normalization + EpiScore
# Phenotypes: any_mets · ln_only · distant
# NOTE: ComBat is DISABLED — same-cohort v1/v2; using intersected probes instead.

## ── USER SETTINGS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
idat_v1  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/idats/"
idat_v2  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/25_samples/"
meta_csv <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

phenotypes          <- c(any  = "any_mets",
                         ln   = "ln_only",
                         dist = "distant")
variance_percentile <- 0.90  # 0 ⇒ keep all CpGs

## NEW: centralize outputs/caches here
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(minfi)
  library(sesame)
  library(ENmix)
  library(matrixStats)
  library(limma)
  # library(sva)   # <- not needed since ComBat is off
  library(HiTIMED)
  library(EpiDISH)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(glue)
})

read_csv_silent <- function(file, ...) {
  if (utils::packageVersion("readr") >= "2.0.0") {
    readr::read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE, ...)
  } else {
    suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(file, ...))
  }
}

## ── 1) β-matrix (cached) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## cache under Results
cache_dir <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache")
dir.create(cache_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
beta_rds      <- file.path(cache_dir, "beta_comb_qc.rds")
manifest_csv  <- file.path(cache_dir, "sample_manifest_v1_v2.csv")

read_pp <- function(path, tag) {
  rg  <- read.metharray.exp(path, recursive = TRUE, extended = TRUE, force = TRUE)
  bet <- getBeta(preprocessNoob(rg, dyeMethod = "single"))
  if (tag == "v2") bet <- betasCollapseToPfx(bet)
  bad <- ENmix::QCinfo(rg)$badCpG
  bet <- bet[ setdiff(rownames(bet), bad), , drop = FALSE]
  bet
}

## Save sample IDs per platform so we can label Array_Version later
if (!file.exists(beta_rds)) {
  msg("Reading / normalising IDATs …")
  beta1 <- read_pp(idat_v1, "v1")
  beta2 <- read_pp(idat_v2, "v2")

  sample_ids_v1 <- colnames(beta1)
  sample_ids_v2 <- colnames(beta2)

  common <- intersect(rownames(beta1), rownames(beta2))
  stopifnot(length(common) > 0)
  beta_comb <- cbind(beta1[common, , drop = FALSE],
                     beta2[common, , drop = FALSE])

  saveRDS(list(beta = beta_comb,
               sample_ids_v1 = sample_ids_v1,
               sample_ids_v2 = sample_ids_v2),
          beta_rds)

  tibble(
    SampleID = c(sample_ids_v1, sample_ids_v2),
    Array_Version = c(rep("v1", length(sample_ids_v1)),
                      rep("v2", length(sample_ids_v2)))
  ) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    write_csv(manifest_csv)

  msg("β-matrix cached.")
} else {
  cache_obj <- readRDS(beta_rds)
  if (is.list(cache_obj) && !is.null(cache_obj$beta)) {
    beta_comb     <- cache_obj$beta
    sample_ids_v1 <- cache_obj$sample_ids_v1
    sample_ids_v2 <- cache_obj$sample_ids_v2
  } else {
    ## backward compat if the RDS used to be only the matrix
    beta_comb     <- cache_obj
    sample_ids_v1 <- character(0)
    sample_ids_v2 <- character(0)
  }
  msg("β-matrix loaded from cache.")
}

## --- Remove sex-linked probes ----------------------------------------------
get_annotation_for <- function(beta_mat) {
  if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19))
    a <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  } else if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19))
    a <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19)
  } else {
    stop("Install an Illumina methylation annotation package (EPIC or 450k).")
  }
  a[rownames(a) %in% rownames(beta_mat), , drop = FALSE]
}

anno <- get_annotation_for(beta_comb)

# Try multiple possible chromosome fields across annotation versions
chr_vec <- NULL
if ("chr" %in% colnames(anno))             chr_vec <- anno$chr
if (is.null(chr_vec) && "CHR" %in% colnames(anno))      chr_vec <- anno$CHR
if (is.null(chr_vec) && "seqnames" %in% colnames(anno)) chr_vec <- as.character(anno$seqnames)
if (is.null(chr_vec)) stop("Could not find chromosome column in annotation.")

is_sex_chr <- chr_vec %in% c("chrX","chrY","X","Y")
sex_probes <- rownames(anno)[is_sex_chr]

n_before <- nrow(beta_comb)
if (length(sex_probes) > 0) {
  beta_comb <- beta_comb[setdiff(rownames(beta_comb), sex_probes), , drop = FALSE]
}
msg(length(sex_probes), " chrX/chrY probes removed; ",
    n_before, " → ", nrow(beta_comb), " CpGs remain.")

## ── Variance filter (optional) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
M.mat <- log2(beta_comb / pmax(1 - beta_comb, 1e-6) + 1e-6)
if (variance_percentile > 0) {
  v <- rowVars(M.mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  var_thr <- quantile(v, variance_percentile, na.rm = TRUE)
  keep    <- v > var_thr
  beta_comb <- beta_comb[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  M.mat     <- M.mat[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  msg(sum(keep), " CpGs kept (top ", 100 * (1 - variance_percentile), "% var).")
}

## ── 2a) EpiScore for fibroblasts (RPC) ──────────────────────────────────────
data(centEpiFibIC.m)  # built-in colon-fibroblast reference

run_episcore <- function(beta) {
  common <- intersect(rownames(beta), rownames(centEpiFibIC.m))
  est    <- epidish(beta[common, ],
                    centEpiFibIC.m[common, ],
                    method = "RPC")$estF
  as.data.frame(est) * 100    # columns = Epi, Fib, IC
}

msg("Running EpiScore (RPC) for fibroblast …")
fib_scores <- run_episcore(beta_comb) %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID")

## ── 2b) HiTIMED deconvolution (h = 6) ───────────────────────────────────────
msg("Running HiTIMED  h = 6 …")
frac_h6 <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(beta_comb, "COAD", h = 6) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  left_join(fib_scores, by = "SampleID")   # adds Fib from EpiScore

## ── 3) Collapse / normalise fractions ───────────────────────────────────────
collapse_frac <- function(df) {
  get_ <- function(x) if (x %in% names(df)) df[[x]] else 0
  imm_cols <- c("CD8mem","CD8nv","CD4mem","CD4nv","Treg","Bmem","Bnv","DC","Mono","NK")
  totalImm <- rowSums(df[imm_cols], na.rm = TRUE); totalImm[totalImm == 0] <- NA
  tibble(
    SampleID     = df$SampleID,
    Tumor        = get_("Tumor"),
    Fibroblast   = get_("Fib"),               # from EpiScore
    StromalOther = get_("Endothelial") + get_("Epithelial"),
    CD8_T        = (get_("CD8mem") + get_("CD8nv")) / totalImm,
    LymphOther   = (get_("CD4mem") + get_("CD4nv") +
                    get_("Treg")   + get_("Bmem") + get_("Bnv")) / totalImm
  ) %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), as.numeric))
}

## ── 4) Tier templates (unchanged design) ────────────────────────────────────
tier_template <- list(
  Tier1 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num"),
  Tier2 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num","Tumor"),
  Tier3 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num","Tumor",
            "Fibroblast","StromalOther",
            "CD8_T","LymphOther")
)
trim_tiers <- function(tiers, avail) lapply(tiers, intersect, avail)

## ── 5) Loop over phenotypes (NO ComBat) ─────────────────────────────────────
for (pheno_tag in names(phenotypes)) {
  pheno_var <- phenotypes[[pheno_tag]]
  msg("\n===== ", pheno_var, " =====")

  meta <- read_csv_silent(meta_csv) %>%
    mutate(
      SampleID      = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
      any_mets      = as.integer(any_mets),
      distant       = as.integer(Distant_Mets),
      ln_only       = as.integer(ln_only),
      sex_num       = as.integer(sex == "M"),
      MLH1_num      = as.integer(MLH1 == 1)
    )

  ## Use saved vectors to tag array version (for reference only)
  meta <- meta %>%
    mutate(
      Array_Version = case_when(
        SampleID %in% sample_ids_v1 ~ "v1",
        SampleID %in% sample_ids_v2 ~ "v2",
        TRUE                        ~ NA_character_
      )
    )

  if (any(is.na(meta$Array_Version))) {
    miss <- meta$SampleID[is.na(meta$Array_Version)]
    msg("WARNING: ", length(miss), " meta SampleIDs not matched to v1/v2: ",
        paste(head(miss, 8), collapse = ", "),
        if (length(miss) > 8) " …" else "")
  }

  meta$pheno_bin <- dplyr::case_when(
    pheno_var == "any_mets" ~ meta$any_mets,
    pheno_var == "distant"  ~ meta$distant,
    pheno_var == "ln_only"  ~ (meta$ln_only & !meta$distant),
    TRUE                    ~ NA_integer_
  )
  stopifnot(all(meta$pheno_bin %in% 0:1, na.rm = TRUE))

  frac_df  <- collapse_frac(frac_h6)
  meta_all <- left_join(meta, frac_df, by = "SampleID")
  ok       <- complete.cases(meta_all[, tier_template$Tier3])
  meta_f   <- meta_all[ok, , drop = FALSE]
  M_f      <- M.mat[, meta_f$SampleID, drop = FALSE]

  ## NO ComBat: same-cohort v1/v2 + intersected probes is sufficient
  M_cb <- M_f

  tier_list <- trim_tiers(tier_template, names(meta_f))
  fits <- purrr::map(tier_list, function(covs) {
    # Only numeric covariates with non-zero variance; use stats::sd explicitly
    is_var <- vapply(
      meta_f[covs],
      function(x) is.numeric(x) && is.finite(stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)) && stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0,
      logical(1)
    )
    nz <- covs[is_var]

    form <- if (length(nz) == 0) {
      ~ pheno_bin
    } else {
      as.formula(paste("~ pheno_bin +", paste(nz, collapse = " + ")))
    }
    des <- model.matrix(form, meta_f)
    eBayes(lmFit(M_cb, des), trend = TRUE, robust = TRUE)
  })

  ## write results under Results root
  out_dir <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{pheno_tag}"), "H6")
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  saveRDS(fits, file.path(out_dir, "ewas_fits.rds"))
  msg("✓  fits saved → ", out_dir)
}

msg("\n✅ Finished: Any, LN-only, Distant  (HiTIMED-h6, immune-normalised + EpiScore; NO ComBat)")
```


Looking at TSS and Body methylation levels for PD-1 for Possible exhaustion story
```{r}
###############################################################################
# PDCD1_region_comparison_population.R
# Population-level test: Is Body methylation ≠ TSS within each mets group?
# - Plot β-values (TSS vs Body) with optional paired lines
# - Stats on M-values (paired Wilcoxon), with HL median difference + 95% CI
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(readr); library(glue)
  library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  library(ggplot2); library(ggpubr)
})

## ---- Inputs ----------------------------------------------------------------
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
out_dir      <- file.path(results_root, "PDCD1_summary")
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

beta_rds     <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache", "beta_comb_qc.rds")
meta_csv     <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

## ---- Load beta matrix + meta ------------------------------------------------
beta_comb <- {
  obj <- readRDS(beta_rds)
  if (is.list(obj) && !is.null(obj$beta)) obj$beta else obj
}
meta <- read_csv(meta_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
    mets_progression = case_when(
      Distant_Mets == 1 ~ "Distant Mets",
      ln_only == 1      ~ "LN-only Mets",
      TRUE              ~ "No Mets"
    ),
    mets_progression = factor(mets_progression,
                              levels = c("No Mets","LN-only Mets","Distant Mets"))
  ) %>% select(SampleID, mets_progression)

common_ids <- intersect(colnames(beta_comb), meta$SampleID)
stopifnot(length(common_ids) > 0)
beta_comb <- beta_comb[, common_ids, drop = FALSE]
meta      <- filter(meta, SampleID %in% common_ids)

## ---- Annotation: PDCD1 CpGs (TSS + Body) -----------------------------------
anno <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19) %>% as.data.frame()
pdcd1_tbl <- anno %>%
  filter(UCSC_RefGene_Name == "PDCD1",
         UCSC_RefGene_Group %in% c("TSS1500","TSS200","Body")) %>%
  select(Name, UCSC_RefGene_Group) %>%
  filter(Name %in% rownames(beta_comb))

tss_cpgs  <- pdcd1_tbl %>% filter(UCSC_RefGene_Group %in% c("TSS1500","TSS200")) %>% pull(Name)
body_cpgs <- pdcd1_tbl %>% filter(UCSC_RefGene_Group == "Body") %>% pull(Name)
if (!length(tss_cpgs) && !length(body_cpgs)) stop("No PDCD1 TSS or Body CpGs present in matrix.")

## ---- Collapse per region (β for plot; M for stats) -------------------------
to_m <- function(b) log2((b + 1e-6) / (1 - b + 1e-6))  # safe logit2

collapse_region <- function(cpgs, beta_mat, region_label){
  B <- beta_mat[cpgs, , drop = FALSE]                    # CpG x sample (β)
  M <- apply(B, 1, to_m) %>% t()                         # CpG x sample (M)
  tibble(
    SampleID      = colnames(B),
    Region        = region_label,
    BetaCollapsed = colMeans(B, na.rm = TRUE),           # mean β across CpGs
    Mmean         = colMeans(M, na.rm = TRUE)            # mean M across CpGs
  )
}
df_tss  <- collapse_region(tss_cpgs,  beta_comb, "TSS")
df_body <- collapse_region(body_cpgs, beta_comb, "Body")

scores <- bind_rows(df_tss, df_body) %>%
  left_join(meta, by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(mets_progression))

## ---- Compute paired stats (Body vs TSS) per mets group ---------------------
# For each group, form paired vectors of Mmean_Body and Mmean_TSS per patient.
paired_stats <- scores %>%
  select(SampleID, Region, BetaCollapsed, Mmean, mets_progression) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Region, values_from = c(BetaCollapsed, Mmean)) %>%
  group_by(mets_progression) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x
    # Paired Wilcoxon on M-values, with HL median difference & 95% CI
    wt <- wilcox.test(df$Mmean_Body, df$Mmean_TSS,
                      paired = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE, conf.level = 0.95,
                      alternative = "two.sided", exact = FALSE)

    # Also compute Δβ for interpretability
    delta_beta <- df$BetaCollapsed_Body - df$BetaCollapsed_TSS
    tibble(
      n_pairs         = sum(complete.cases(df$Mmean_Body, df$Mmean_TSS)),
      wilcox_p        = wt$p.value,
      HL_delta_M      = unname(wt$estimate),             # Hodges–Lehmann (Body−TSS) on M
      HL_CI_low_M     = wt$conf.int[1],
      HL_CI_high_M    = wt$conf.int[2],
      median_delta_beta = median(delta_beta, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_delta_beta   = mean(delta_beta,  na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  }) %>% ungroup() %>%
  mutate(wilcox_p_adj = p.adjust(wilcox_p, method = "BH"))

# Save stats
stats_csv <- file.path(out_dir, "PDCD1_TSSvsBody_population_stats.csv")
write_csv(paired_stats, stats_csv)

## ---- Build plot data (β-values) --------------------------------------------
plot_df <- scores %>%
  select(SampleID, Region, BetaCollapsed, mets_progression)

# Make label table to show BH-adjusted p per facet
lab_df <- paired_stats %>%
  mutate(label = glue::glue("Wilcoxon (M): p(BH) = {formatC(wilcox_p_adj, format='e', digits=2)}\nΔβ median = {sprintf('%.3f', median_delta_beta)}")) %>%
  left_join(
    plot_df %>% group_by(mets_progression) %>% summarise(y = min(0.98, max(BetaCollapsed) + 0.06)),
    by = "mets_progression"
  )

## ---- Plot: β-values with TSS vs Body side-by-side per group ----------------
p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Region, y = BetaCollapsed, fill = Region)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.6, alpha = 0.75, color = "gray30") +
  geom_jitter(aes(group = SampleID), width = 0.15, size = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
  # optional: paired lines help reviewers see the within-patient direction
  # geom_line(aes(group = SampleID), color = "gray70", alpha = 0.5,
  #           position = position_dodge2(width = 0.6, preserve = "single")) +
  facet_wrap(~ mets_progression) +
  geom_text(data = lab_df, aes(x = 1.5, y = y, label = label),
            size = 3.4, vjust = 0, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TSS" = "#1f78b4", "Body" = "#e31a1c")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "PDCD1: Body vs TSS methylation within metastasis groups",
    x = NULL, y = "β-value (mean across CpGs per region)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = "gray50"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "PDCD1_TSSvsBody_population_plot.pdf"),
       p, width = 7.2, height = 5.0, device = cairo_pdf)

cat("✓ Saved:\n  -", stats_csv, "\n  -", file.path(out_dir, "PDCD1_TSSvsBody_population_plot.pdf"), "\n")
```

Expanding single gene analysis to include metastasis related genes
```{r}
###############################################################################
# gene_region_beta_plots_Mstats.R
# Purpose: For each gene of interest, show β-values (TSS vs Body) across
#          No Mets / LN-only / Distant, with paired Wilcoxon stats on M-values.
# Output : One PDF per gene + a combined CSV of stats.
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(readr); library(glue)
  library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  library(ggplot2); library(ggpubr)
})

## ---- Inputs you can tweak ---------------------------------------------------
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
out_dir      <- file.path(results_root, "GeneRegionSummaries")
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

beta_rds     <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache", "beta_comb_qc.rds")
meta_csv     <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

## Choose a small, hypothesis-driven set (edit this vector).
## Examples pulled from your significant contrasts:
genes_of_interest <- c(
  "PDCD1",       # (reference)
  "SLIT2", "SOCS1", "COL11A1", "ZEB1", "INHBB",
  "WNT7A", "WNT6", "ROBO1", "LCP1", "EPHB1", "ADAMTS18"
)

## ---- Load β-matrix + meta ---------------------------------------------------
beta_comb <- {
  obj <- readRDS(beta_rds)
  if (is.list(obj) && !is.null(obj$beta)) obj$beta else obj
}
meta <- read_csv(meta_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
    mets_progression = case_when(
      Distant_Mets == 1 ~ "Distant Mets",
      ln_only == 1      ~ "LN-only Mets",
      TRUE              ~ "No Mets"
    ),
    mets_progression = factor(mets_progression,
                              levels = c("No Mets","LN-only Mets","Distant Mets"))
  ) %>% select(SampleID, mets_progression)

common_ids <- intersect(colnames(beta_comb), meta$SampleID)
stopifnot(length(common_ids) > 0)
beta_comb <- beta_comb[, common_ids, drop = FALSE]
meta      <- filter(meta, SampleID %in% common_ids)

## ---- Annotation helper ------------------------------------------------------
anno <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19) %>% as.data.frame()

get_gene_cpgs <- function(gene_symbol, beta_mat, anno_df){
  df <- anno_df %>%
    filter(UCSC_RefGene_Name == gene_symbol,
           UCSC_RefGene_Group %in% c("TSS200","TSS1500","Body")) %>%
    select(Name, UCSC_RefGene_Group) %>%
    filter(Name %in% rownames(beta_mat))
  list(
    tss  = df %>% filter(UCSC_RefGene_Group %in% c("TSS200","TSS1500")) %>% pull(Name),
    body = df %>% filter(UCSC_RefGene_Group == "Body") %>% pull(Name)
  )
}

## ---- Transform + collapse ---------------------------------------------------
to_m <- function(b) log2((b + 1e-6) / (1 - b + 1e-6))  # safe logit2

collapse_region <- function(cpgs, beta_mat, label){
  if (!length(cpgs)) return(NULL)
  B <- beta_mat[cpgs, , drop = FALSE]
  M <- t(apply(B, 1, to_m))
  tibble(
    SampleID      = colnames(B),
    Region        = label,
    BetaCollapsed = colMeans(B, na.rm = TRUE),
    Mmean         = colMeans(M, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

## ---- Core function: one gene -> plot + stats row ----------------------------
analyze_gene <- function(gene_symbol, beta_mat, meta_df, anno_df, out_dir){
  cpgs <- get_gene_cpgs(gene_symbol, beta_mat, anno_df)
  if (!length(cpgs$tss) && !length(cpgs$body)) {
    message("Skipping ", gene_symbol, ": no TSS or Body CpGs present in matrix.")
    return(NULL)
  }
  df_tss  <- collapse_region(cpgs$tss,  beta_mat, "TSS")
  df_body <- collapse_region(cpgs$body, beta_mat, "Body")
  scores <- bind_rows(df_tss, df_body) %>%
    left_join(meta_df, by = "SampleID") %>%
    filter(!is.na(mets_progression))

  # If either region missing, still plot what exists; stats need both.
  have_both <- all(c("TSS","Body") %in% unique(scores$Region))
  stats_tbl <- NULL
  if (have_both) {
    df_wide <- scores %>%
      select(SampleID, Region, BetaCollapsed, Mmean, mets_progression) %>%
      tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Region, values_from = c(BetaCollapsed, Mmean))

    stats_tbl <- df_wide %>%
      group_by(mets_progression) %>%
      group_modify(~{
        d <- .x
        ok <- complete.cases(d$Mmean_Body, d$Mmean_TSS)
        if (!any(ok)) return(tibble(
          n_pairs = 0, wilcox_p = NA_real_, HL_delta_M = NA_real_,
          HL_CI_low_M = NA_real_, HL_CI_high_M = NA_real_,
          median_delta_beta = NA_real_, mean_delta_beta = NA_real_
        ))
        wt <- wilcox.test(d$Mmean_Body[ok], d$Mmean_TSS[ok],
                          paired = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE, conf.level = 0.95,
                          alternative = "two.sided", exact = FALSE)
        delta_beta <- d$BetaCollapsed_Body[ok] - d$BetaCollapsed_TSS[ok]
        tibble(
          n_pairs            = sum(ok),
          wilcox_p           = wt$p.value,
          HL_delta_M         = unname(wt$estimate),
          HL_CI_low_M        = wt$conf.int[1],
          HL_CI_high_M       = wt$conf.int[2],
          median_delta_beta  = median(delta_beta, na.rm = TRUE),
          mean_delta_beta    = mean(delta_beta,  na.rm = TRUE)
        )
      }) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate(gene = gene_symbol,
             wilcox_p_adj = p.adjust(wilcox_p, method = "BH")) %>%
      relocate(gene, .before = 1)
  }

  # Build plot labels (β-space)
  plot_df <- scores %>% select(SampleID, Region, BetaCollapsed, mets_progression)
  lab_df <- NULL
  if (!is.null(stats_tbl)) {
    lab_df <- stats_tbl %>%
      mutate(label = glue("Wilcoxon (M): p(BH) = {formatC(wilcox_p_adj, format='e', digits=2)}\nΔβ median = {sprintf('%.3f', median_delta_beta)}")) %>%
      left_join(
        plot_df %>% group_by(mets_progression) %>% summarise(y = min(0.98, max(BetaCollapsed) + 0.06)),
        by = "mets_progression"
      )
  }

  p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Region, y = BetaCollapsed, fill = Region)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.6, alpha = 0.75, color = "gray30") +
    geom_jitter(aes(group = SampleID), width = 0.15, size = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
    facet_wrap(~ mets_progression) +
    { if (!is.null(lab_df)) geom_text(data = lab_df, aes(x = 1.5, y = y, label = label),
                                      size = 3.2, vjust = 0, inherit.aes = FALSE) } +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("TSS" = "#1f78b4", "Body" = "#e31a1c")) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
    labs(
      title = glue("{gene_symbol}: Body vs TSS methylation within metastasis groups"),
      x = NULL, y = "β-value (mean across CpGs per region)"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = "gray50"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5)
    )

  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, glue("{gene_symbol}_TSSvsBody_betaPlot.pdf")),
         p, width = 7.2, height = 5.0, device = cairo_pdf)

  stats_tbl
}

## ---- Run over all genes and save a combined stats table ---------------------
all_stats <- purrr::map_dfr(genes_of_interest, ~ analyze_gene(.x, beta_comb, meta, anno, out_dir))

if (nrow(all_stats)) {
  write_csv(all_stats, file.path(out_dir, "AllGenes_TSSvsBody_population_stats.csv"))
}

cat("✓ Saved per-gene PDF plots to:\n  ", out_dir,
    "\n✓ Stats CSV (if any):\n  ", file.path(out_dir, "AllGenes_TSSvsBody_population_stats.csv"), "\n")
```

```{r}
###############################################################################
# HiTIMED h=6 + immune collapse/normalization + merge with PDCD1 Δβ/ΔM (scores)
# - Uses your cached β-matrix: Results/ewas_cache/beta_comb_qc.rds
# - Runs HiTIMED_deconvolution(..., tumor_type="COAD", h=6, tissue_type="tumor")
# - Collapses CD8nv+CD8mem → CD8_total; keeps Treg explicitly
# - Builds Immune_total from available immune components; normalizes CD8/Treg
# - Adds Fib via EpiDISH if missing in HiTIMED output
# - Merges with `scores` (must already exist) to yield `delta_tbl_h6`
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(readr); library(tibble)
  library(HiTIMED); library(EpiDISH)
})

## ---- Paths ------------------------------------------------------------------
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
beta_rds     <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache", "beta_comb_qc.rds")

## ---- Load β from cache ------------------------------------------------------
beta_obj  <- readRDS(beta_rds)
beta_comb <- if (is.list(beta_obj) && !is.null(beta_obj$beta)) beta_obj$beta else beta_obj
stopifnot(is.matrix(beta_comb))

## ---- Align to `scores` samples if `scores` exists ---------------------------
## Expect `scores` with: SampleID, Region (TSS/Body), BetaCollapsed, Mmean, mets_progression
if (!exists("scores")) stop("`scores` (PDCD1 TSS/Body collapsed table) must already exist in the session.")
keep_ids <- intersect(colnames(beta_comb), unique(scores$SampleID))
if (length(keep_ids) == 0) stop("No overlapping SampleID between beta_comb and scores.")
beta_comb <- beta_comb[, keep_ids, drop = FALSE]

## ---- Run HiTIMED h=6 (COAD, tumor tissue) ----------------------------------
frac_h6 <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(
  tumor_beta  = beta_comb,
  tumor_type  = "COAD",
  h           = 6,
  tissue_type = "tumor"
) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID")

## ---- Add Fib via EpiDISH (if not provided by HiTIMED) ----------------------
if (!"Fib" %in% names(frac_h6)) {
  data("centEpiFibIC.m", package = "EpiDISH", envir = environment())
  common <- intersect(rownames(beta_comb), rownames(centEpiFibIC.m))
  fib_est <- epidish(beta_comb[common, , drop = FALSE],
                     centEpiFibIC.m[common, , drop = FALSE],
                     method = "RPC")$estF %>%
    as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% select(SampleID, Fib)
  frac_h6 <- frac_h6 %>% left_join(fib_est, by = "SampleID")
}

## ---- Helpers ----------------------------------------------------------------
present  <- function(df, candidates) intersect(candidates, names(df))
sum_cols <- function(df, cols) if (length(cols)) rowSums(df[cols], na.rm = TRUE) else rep(0, nrow(df))

## ---- Identify immune components at h=6 --------------------------------------
# Common h=6 immune components (adjusted defensively)
cd8_parts <- present(frac_h6, c("CD8nv","CD8mem"))
cd4_parts <- present(frac_h6, c("CD4nv","CD4mem"))  # Treg handled separately
b_parts   <- present(frac_h6, c("Bnv","Bmem","Bcell","B"))
innate    <- present(frac_h6, c("NK","Mono","Monocyte","DC","Neu","Neutrophil","Eos","Eosinophil","Bas","Basophil"))
treg_col  <- present(frac_h6, c("Treg","Tregs","Regulatory_T"))

# Build totals
CD8_total <- if (length(cd8_parts)) sum_cols(frac_h6, cd8_parts) else {
  # graceful fallback if a single CD8 column exists
  cd8_fallback <- present(frac_h6, c("CD8T","CD8"))
  if (length(cd8_fallback)) frac_h6[[cd8_fallback[1]]] else rep(NA_real_, nrow(frac_h6))
}
CD4_total_noTreg <- if (length(cd4_parts)) sum_cols(frac_h6, cd4_parts) else rep(0, nrow(frac_h6))
Treg_vals        <- if (length(treg_col)) frac_h6[[treg_col[1]]] else rep(NA_real_, nrow(frac_h6))

# Immune_total = CD8_total + CD4_total_noTreg + Treg + B + innate
Immune_total <- CD8_total +
                CD4_total_noTreg +
                ifelse(is.na(Treg_vals), 0, Treg_vals) +
                sum_cols(frac_h6, b_parts) +
                sum_cols(frac_h6, innate)
Immune_total[!is.finite(Immune_total) | Immune_total <= 1e-6] <- NA_real_

## ---- StromalOther (optional covariate) --------------------------------------
stromal_cols <- present(frac_h6, c("Endothelial","Epithelial"))
StromalOther <- if (length(stromal_cols)) rowSums(frac_h6[stromal_cols], na.rm = TRUE) else rep(NA_real_, nrow(frac_h6))

## ---- Normalized fractions ---------------------------------------------------
frac_h6_norm <- frac_h6 %>%
  mutate(
    CD8_total     = CD8_total,
    CD4_total     = CD4_total_noTreg + ifelse(is.na(Treg_vals), 0, Treg_vals),
    Treg          = Treg_vals,
    Immune_total  = Immune_total,
    CD8_total_norm = CD8_total / Immune_total,
    Treg_norm      = Treg      / Immune_total,
    StromalOther   = StromalOther
  ) %>%
  select(SampleID, CD8_total, Treg, Immune_total,
         CD8_total_norm, Treg_norm, StromalOther, Fib, everything())

## ---- Build Δβ / ΔM from `scores` and merge ---------------------------------
delta_tbl_h6 <- scores %>%
  select(SampleID, Region, BetaCollapsed, Mmean, mets_progression) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Region, values_from = c(BetaCollapsed, Mmean)) %>%
  mutate(
    Delta_Beta = BetaCollapsed_Body - BetaCollapsed_TSS,
    Delta_M    = Mmean_Body        - Mmean_TSS
  ) %>%
  left_join(frac_h6_norm, by = "SampleID")

## ---- Sanity outputs ---------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n[HiTIMED h=6] Detected immune parts:\n",
    "  CD8 parts: ", paste(if(length(cd8_parts)) cd8_parts else "(none; used fallback if available)", collapse="+"), "\n",
    "  CD4 parts (no Treg): ", paste(if(length(cd4_parts)) cd4_parts else "(none)", collapse="+"), "\n",
    "  Treg col: ", if(length(treg_col)) treg_col[1] else "(none)", "\n",
    "  B parts: ", paste(if(length(b_parts)) b_parts else "(none)", collapse="+"), "\n",
    "  Innate: ", paste(if(length(innate)) innate else "(none)", collapse=", "), "\n\n", sep = "")

print(delta_tbl_h6 %>%
        select(SampleID, mets_progression,
               Delta_Beta, Delta_M,
               CD8_total_norm, Treg_norm, Fib, StromalOther) %>%
        head(12))

# Result: delta_tbl_h6 (merged table ready for correlations/plots/models)

###############################################################################
# PDCD1 Δβ (Body – TSS) vs CD8 (HiTIMED h=6) — clean plot, no grid, no color by mets
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(ggplot2); library(rlang)
})

# ---- Helper: find the h=6 fractions table -----------------------------------
get_frac_h6 <- function() {
  if (exists("fractions_h6", inherits = TRUE)) return(get("fractions_h6", inherits = TRUE))
  if (exists("frac_h6",     inherits = TRUE)) return(get("frac_h6",     inherits = TRUE))
  if (exists("frac_6",      inherits = TRUE)) return(get("frac_6",      inherits = TRUE))
  if (exists("HIT_DH",      inherits = TRUE)) {
    HIT <- get("HIT_DH", inherits = TRUE)
    if (is.list(HIT) && !is.null(HIT[["h6"]])) return(HIT[["h6"]])
  }
  stop("Could not find fractions table. Expected one of: fractions_h6, frac_h6, frac_6, or HIT_DH[['h6']].")
}

frac_raw <- get_frac_h6()

if (!"SampleID" %in% names(frac_raw)) {
  if (!is.null(rownames(frac_raw)) && all(nzchar(rownames(frac_raw)))) {
    frac_raw <- tibble::rownames_to_column(as.data.frame(frac_raw), "SampleID")
  } else {
    stop("Fractions table has no 'SampleID' column and no usable rownames.")
  }
}

# ---- Normalize immune features ----------------------------------------------
immune_candidates <- c(
  "Bas","Eos","Neu","Mono","DC","NK",
  "Bnv","Bmem","CD4nv","CD4mem","Treg",
  "CD8nv","CD8mem"
)
present_immune <- intersect(immune_candidates, names(frac_raw))

frac_h6_norm <- frac_raw %>%
  mutate(
    CD8_total     = CD8nv + CD8mem,
    Immune_total  = rowSums(across(all_of(present_immune)), na.rm = TRUE),
    CD8_total_norm = if_else(Immune_total > 0, CD8_total / Immune_total, NA_real_),
    Treg_norm      = if ("Treg" %in% names(.)) if_else(Immune_total > 0, Treg / Immune_total, NA_real_) else NA_real_,
    StromalOther   = (if ("Endothelial" %in% names(.)) Endothelial else 0) +
                     (if ("Epithelial"  %in% names(.)) Epithelial  else 0)
  )

frac_keep <- frac_h6_norm %>%
  select(SampleID, CD8_total_norm, Treg_norm,
         Fib = dplyr::any_of("Fib"),
         StromalOther)

# ---- Build Δβ table ---------------------------------------------------------
scores_df <- get("scores", inherits = TRUE)

delta_tbl_h6 <- scores_df %>%
  select(SampleID, Region, BetaCollapsed, mets_progression) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Region, values_from = BetaCollapsed) %>%
  mutate(Delta_Beta = (Body %||% NA_real_) - (TSS %||% NA_real_)) %>%
  left_join(frac_keep, by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Delta_Beta), !is.na(CD8_total_norm))

# ---- Linear model -----------------------------------------------------------
covars <- c("CD8_total_norm",
            if ("mets_progression" %in% names(delta_tbl_h6)) "mets_progression",
            if ("Fib"             %in% names(delta_tbl_h6)) "Fib",
            if ("StromalOther"    %in% names(delta_tbl_h6)) "StromalOther")

form <- as.formula(paste("Delta_Beta ~", paste(covars, collapse = " + ")))
fit  <- lm(form, data = delta_tbl_h6)
print(summary(fit))

cd8_term <- summary(fit)$coefficients[rownames(summary(fit)$coefficients) %in% "CD8_total_norm", , drop = FALSE]
cd8_lab  <- if (nrow(cd8_term) == 1) {
  paste0("LM slope (CD8_norm) = ", signif(cd8_term[1, "Estimate"], 3),
         ", p = ", signif(cd8_term[1, "Pr(>|t|)"], 3))
} else {
  "LM fitted"
}

# ---- Plot Δβ vs CD8 (no color by mets, no grid) ------------------------------
p <- ggplot(delta_tbl_h6, aes(x = CD8_total_norm, y = Delta_Beta)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.85, color = "#1f78b4") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black") +
  labs(x = "CD8 fraction (HiTIMED h=6, normalized by total immune)",
       y = expression(Delta*beta~"(Body – TSS)"),
       title = "PDCD1: Δβ vs CD8 infiltration",
       subtitle = cd8_lab) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# ---- Save -------------------------------------------------------------------
out_dir <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results/PDCD1_analysis"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "PDCD1_DeltaBeta_vs_CD8norm_h6_LM_clean.pdf"),
       p, width = 6.2, height = 5.0)
```

```{r}
###############################################################################
# gene_region_beta_plots_clean.R
# Purpose: Clean per-gene plots for Illustrator
# - β-values (TSS vs Body) across metastasis groups
# - No titles, no stats labels, no facet strip backgrounds, no grid lines
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(readr); library(glue)
  library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  library(ggplot2)
})

## ---- Inputs -----------------------------------------------------------------
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
out_dir      <- file.path(results_root, "GeneRegionSummaries_clean")
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

beta_rds     <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache", "beta_comb_qc.rds")
meta_csv     <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

genes_of_interest <- c(
  "PDCD1",
  "SLIT2", "SOCS1", "COL11A1", "TCF8", "INHBB",
  "WNT7A", "WNT6", "ROBO1", "LCP1", "EPHB1", "ADAMTS18"
)

## ---- Load β-matrix + meta ---------------------------------------------------
beta_comb <- {
  obj <- readRDS(beta_rds)
  if (is.list(obj) && !is.null(obj$beta)) obj$beta else obj
}
meta <- read_csv(meta_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
    mets_progression = case_when(
      Distant_Mets == 1 ~ "Distant Mets",
      ln_only == 1      ~ "LN-only Mets",
      TRUE              ~ "No Mets"
    ),
    mets_progression = factor(mets_progression,
                              levels = c("No Mets","LN-only Mets","Distant Mets"))
  ) %>% select(SampleID, mets_progression)

common_ids <- intersect(colnames(beta_comb), meta$SampleID)
stopifnot(length(common_ids) > 0)
beta_comb <- beta_comb[, common_ids, drop = FALSE]
meta      <- filter(meta, SampleID %in% common_ids)

## ---- Annotation helper ------------------------------------------------------
anno <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19) %>% as.data.frame()

get_gene_cpgs <- function(gene_symbol, beta_mat, anno_df){
  df <- anno_df %>%
    filter(UCSC_RefGene_Name == gene_symbol,
           UCSC_RefGene_Group %in% c("TSS200","TSS1500","Body")) %>%
    select(Name, UCSC_RefGene_Group) %>%
    filter(Name %in% rownames(beta_mat))
  list(
    tss  = df %>% filter(UCSC_RefGene_Group %in% c("TSS200","TSS1500")) %>% pull(Name),
    body = df %>% filter(UCSC_RefGene_Group == "Body") %>% pull(Name)
  )
}

## ---- Transform + collapse ---------------------------------------------------
to_m <- function(b) log2((b + 1e-6) / (1 - b + 1e-6))  # safe logit2

collapse_region <- function(cpgs, beta_mat, label){
  if (!length(cpgs)) return(NULL)
  B <- beta_mat[cpgs, , drop = FALSE]
  M <- t(apply(B, 1, to_m))
  tibble(
    SampleID      = colnames(B),
    Region        = label,
    BetaCollapsed = colMeans(B, na.rm = TRUE),
    Mmean         = colMeans(M, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

## ---- Core function: one gene -> clean plot ---------------------------------
analyze_gene_clean <- function(gene_symbol, beta_mat, meta_df, anno_df, out_dir){
  cpgs <- get_gene_cpgs(gene_symbol, beta_mat, anno_df)
  if (!length(cpgs$tss) && !length(cpgs$body)) {
    message("Skipping ", gene_symbol, ": no TSS or Body CpGs present in matrix.")
    return(NULL)
  }
  df_tss  <- collapse_region(cpgs$tss,  beta_mat, "TSS")
  df_body <- collapse_region(cpgs$body, beta_mat, "Body")
  scores <- bind_rows(df_tss, df_body) %>%
    left_join(meta_df, by = "SampleID") %>%
    filter(!is.na(mets_progression))

  plot_df <- scores %>% select(SampleID, Region, BetaCollapsed, mets_progression)

p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Region, y = BetaCollapsed, fill = Region)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.6, alpha = 0.75, color = "gray30") +
  geom_jitter(aes(group = SampleID), width = 0.15, size = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ mets_progression) +
  { if (!is.null(lab_df)) geom_text(data = lab_df, aes(x = 1.5, y = y, label = label),
                                    size = 3.2, vjust = 0, inherit.aes = FALSE) } +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TSS" = "#1f78b4", "Body" = "#e31a1c")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(
    x = "Genomic Position (Region)",
    y = "β-value (mean across CpGs per region)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),                # remove grids
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA), # keep box outline
    strip.background = element_blank(),          # remove grey facet boxes
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),   # keep axis lines
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, glue("{gene_symbol}_TSSvsBody_betaPlot_clean.pdf")),
         p, width = 6.5, height = 4.8, device = cairo_pdf)
}

## ---- Run over all genes -----------------------------------------------------
purrr::walk(genes_of_interest, ~ analyze_gene_clean(.x, beta_comb, meta, anno, out_dir))

cat("✓ Saved cleaned per-gene PDF plots to:\n  ", out_dir, "\n")

###############################################################################
# All genes combined plot, broken out by metastasis status, with p-value stars
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(ggplot2); library(ggpubr); library(purrr)
})

# Build one big data frame for all genes
all_plot_df <- purrr::map_dfr(genes_of_interest, function(gene_symbol) {
  cpgs <- get_gene_cpgs(gene_symbol, beta_comb, anno)
  df_tss  <- collapse_region(cpgs$tss,  beta_comb, "TSS")
  df_body <- collapse_region(cpgs$body, beta_comb, "Body")
  bind_rows(df_tss, df_body) %>%
    mutate(Gene = gene_symbol)
})

all_plot_df <- all_plot_df %>%
  left_join(meta, by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(mets_progression))

# Comparisons for TSS vs Body
comparisons <- list(c("TSS", "Body"))

# ---- Corrected Combined Plot: Faceted by Gene + Metastasis Group ----
p_all_genes_mets <- ggplot(all_plot_df,
                           aes(x = Region, y = BetaCollapsed, fill = Region)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7, width = 0.6, color = "gray30") +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 0.7, alpha = 0.5) +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = comparisons, method = "wilcox.test",
                     paired = TRUE, label = "p.signif",
                     hide.ns = TRUE, size = 5) +
  # Facet by both metastasis status and gene to ensure correct comparisons
  facet_wrap(~ mets_progression + Gene, nrow = 3) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TSS" = "#1f78b4", "Body" = "#e31a1c")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(
    x = "Genomic Region",
    y = "β-value (mean across CpGs per region)",
    fill = "Genomic Region"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "gray80", fill = NA),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 8),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "AllGenes_TSSvsBody_Faceted_withPstars.pdf"),
       p_all_genes_mets, width = 10, height = 8, device = cairo_pdf)
```

Testing if markers exist
```{r}
###############################################################################
# exhaustion_gene_check.R
# Purpose: Check which exhaustion genes have annotated CpGs in EPIC array
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(readr); library(stringr); library(tidyr)
  library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
})

## ---- Inputs -----------------------------------------------------------------
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
beta_rds     <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache", "beta_comb_qc.rds")

genes_of_interest <- c(
  "PDCD1",     # PD-1
  "HAVCR2",    # TIM-3
  "CTLA4",     # CTLA-4
  "TIGIT",     # TIGIT
  "LAG3",      # LAG-3
  "VSIR",      # VISTA
  "LAYN",      # LAYN
  "TOX", "TOX2", "TOX3", "TOX4",   # TOX family
  "CCT6A", "TUBA1B",
  "CXCL13",
  "TCF7"       # TCF-1
)

## ---- Load beta to get CpG universe -----------------------------------------
beta_comb <- {
  obj <- readRDS(beta_rds)
  if (is.list(obj) && !is.null(obj$beta)) obj$beta else obj
}
all_cpgs <- rownames(beta_comb)

## ---- Load + preprocess annotation ------------------------------------------
anno <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  # Expand multi-gene entries
  separate_rows(UCSC_RefGene_Name, sep = ";") %>%
  # Expand multi-group entries (e.g., "TSS200;TSS200")
  separate_rows(UCSC_RefGene_Group, sep = ";")

## ---- Check each gene --------------------------------------------------------
check_results <- lapply(genes_of_interest, function(g) {
  df <- anno %>%
    filter(UCSC_RefGene_Name == g,
           UCSC_RefGene_Group %in% c("TSS200","TSS1500","Body"),
           Name %in% all_cpgs)

  tibble(
    Gene    = g,
    n_total = nrow(df),
    n_TSS   = sum(df$UCSC_RefGene_Group %in% c("TSS200","TSS1500")),
    n_Body  = sum(df$UCSC_RefGene_Group == "Body")
  )
}) %>% bind_rows()

print(check_results)

## ---- Save to CSV for reference ----------------------------------------------
out_csv <- file.path(results_root, "ExhaustionGenes_CpGcheck.csv")
write_csv(check_results, out_csv)
cat("✓ Saved check results to:", out_csv, "\n")
```

Looking for exhasution genes
```{r}
###############################################################################
# exhaustion_gene_region_plots.R
# Purpose: Generate clean per-gene plots for exhaustion markers
# - β-values (TSS vs Body) across metastasis groups
# - No titles, no stats labels, no facet strip backgrounds, no grid lines
# - Ensures correct matching of gene names in annotation
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(readr); library(glue)
  library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  library(ggplot2); library(ggpubr); library(purrr)
})

## ---- Inputs -----------------------------------------------------------------
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
out_dir      <- file.path(results_root, "ExhaustionGenePlots_clean")
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

beta_rds     <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache", "beta_comb_qc.rds")
meta_csv     <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

# Exhaustion gene set
genes_of_interest <- c(
  "PDCD1", "HAVCR2", "CTLA4", "TIGIT", "LAG3", "VSIR",
  "LAYN", "TOX", "TOX2", "TOX3", "TOX4",
  "CXCL13", "TCF7",
  "CCT6A", "TUBA1B"
)

## ---- Load β-matrix + meta ---------------------------------------------------
beta_comb <- {
  obj <- readRDS(beta_rds)
  if (is.list(obj) && !is.null(obj$beta)) obj$beta else obj
}
meta <- read_csv(meta_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
    mets_progression = case_when(
      Distant_Mets == 1 ~ "Distant Mets",
      ln_only == 1      ~ "LN-only Mets",
      TRUE              ~ "No Mets"
    ),
    mets_progression = factor(mets_progression,
                              levels = c("No Mets","LN-only Mets","Distant Mets"))
  ) %>% select(SampleID, mets_progression)

common_ids <- intersect(colnames(beta_comb), meta$SampleID)
stopifnot(length(common_ids) > 0)
beta_comb <- beta_comb[, common_ids, drop = FALSE]
meta      <- filter(meta, SampleID %in% common_ids)

## ---- Annotation helper ------------------------------------------------------
anno <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  separate_rows(UCSC_RefGene_Name, sep = ";") %>%
  separate_rows(UCSC_RefGene_Group, sep = ";")

get_gene_cpgs <- function(gene_symbol, beta_mat, anno_df){
  df <- anno_df %>%
    filter(UCSC_RefGene_Name == gene_symbol,
           UCSC_RefGene_Group %in% c("TSS200","TSS1500","Body")) %>%
    filter(Name %in% rownames(beta_mat))
  list(
    tss  = df %>% filter(UCSC_RefGene_Group %in% c("TSS200","TSS1500")) %>% pull(Name),
    body = df %>% filter(UCSC_RefGene_Group == "Body") %>% pull(Name)
  )
}

## ---- Transform + collapse ---------------------------------------------------
to_m <- function(b) log2((b + 1e-6) / (1 - b + 1e-6))  # safe logit2

collapse_region <- function(cpgs, beta_mat, label){
  if (!length(cpgs)) return(NULL)
  B <- beta_mat[cpgs, , drop = FALSE]
  M <- t(apply(B, 1, to_m))
  tibble(
    SampleID      = colnames(B),
    Region        = label,
    BetaCollapsed = colMeans(B, na.rm = TRUE),
    Mmean         = colMeans(M, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

## ---- Core function: one gene -> clean plot ---------------------------------
analyze_gene_clean <- function(gene_symbol, beta_mat, meta_df, anno_df, out_dir){
  cpgs <- get_gene_cpgs(gene_symbol, beta_mat, anno_df)
  if (!length(cpgs$tss) && !length(cpgs$body)) {
    message("Skipping ", gene_symbol, ": no TSS or Body CpGs present in matrix.")
    return(NULL)
  }
  df_tss  <- collapse_region(cpgs$tss,  beta_mat, "TSS")
  df_body <- collapse_region(cpgs$body, beta_mat, "Body")
  scores <- bind_rows(df_tss, df_body) %>%
    left_join(meta_df, by = "SampleID") %>%
    filter(!is.na(mets_progression))

  plot_df <- scores %>% select(SampleID, Region, BetaCollapsed, mets_progression)

  p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Region, y = BetaCollapsed, fill = Region)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.6, alpha = 0.75, color = "gray30") +
    geom_jitter(aes(group = SampleID), width = 0.15, size = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
    facet_wrap(~ mets_progression) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("TSS" = "#1f78b4", "Body" = "#e31a1c")) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
    labs(
      x = "Genomic Position (Region)",
      y = "β-value (mean across CpGs per region)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
      legend.position = "none"
    )

  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, glue("{gene_symbol}_TSSvsBody_betaPlot_clean.pdf")),
         p, width = 6.5, height = 4.8, device = cairo_pdf)
}

## ---- Run over all genes -----------------------------------------------------
walk(genes_of_interest, ~ analyze_gene_clean(.x, beta_comb, meta, anno, out_dir))

cat("✓ Saved cleaned per-gene PDF plots to:\n  ", out_dir, "\n")

###############################################################################
# Combined exhaustion panel plot
###############################################################################

all_plot_df <- map_dfr(genes_of_interest, function(gene_symbol) {
  cpgs <- get_gene_cpgs(gene_symbol, beta_comb, anno)
  df_tss  <- collapse_region(cpgs$tss,  beta_comb, "TSS")
  df_body <- collapse_region(cpgs$body, beta_comb, "Body")
  bind_rows(df_tss, df_body) %>%
    mutate(Gene = gene_symbol)
})

all_plot_df <- all_plot_df %>%
  left_join(meta, by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(mets_progression))

comparisons <- list(c("TSS", "Body"))

p_all_genes_mets <- ggplot(all_plot_df,
                           aes(x = Region, y = BetaCollapsed, fill = Region)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7, width = 0.6, color = "gray30") +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 0.7, alpha = 0.5) +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = comparisons, method = "wilcox.test",
                     paired = TRUE, label = "p.signif",
                     hide.ns = TRUE, size = 5) +
  facet_wrap(~ mets_progression + Gene, nrow = 3) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TSS" = "#1f78b4", "Body" = "#e31a1c")) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(
    x = "Genomic Region",
    y = "β-value (mean across CpGs per region)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "gray80", fill = NA),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 8),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "AllExhaustionGenes_TSSvsBody_Faceted_withPstars.pdf"),
       p_all_genes_mets, width = 12, height = 9, device = cairo_pdf)

cat("✓ Saved combined exhaustion gene panel plot to:\n  ", out_dir, "\n")
```
